failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch output by choosing item 1507389580 at $1157.86 instead of the actual cheapest item, 5339029584 at $1128.99.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was clear: identify the cheapest available Smartphone using the ProductCatalogSearch result. The tool call at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor used that tool output but selected the higher-priced item as the cheapest. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and led to the wrong answer. The later Evaluator did not resolve the error; it approved the wrong answer while acknowledging the lower-priced alternative.
